name: File Upload Protection
description: Protects against malicious file upload attacks. Detects dangerous file extensions, double extensions, null byte injections, and content-type mismatches. Essential for applications accepting file uploads.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Dangerous Executable Extensions
rules.description: Blocks uploads with dangerous executable file extensions.

rules.name: Double Extension Bypass
rules.description: Detects double extension tricks like image.jpg.php used to bypass filters.

rules.name: Null Byte Injection
rules.description: Detects null byte injection used to truncate filenames and bypass extension checks.

rules.name: SVG with Script
rules.description: Detects JavaScript in SVG files which can lead to stored XSS.

rules.name: Webshell Signatures
rules.description: Detects common PHP webshell patterns and signatures.

rules.name: Archive with Executable
rules.description: Detects archive files with executable extensions that might be extracted unsafely.
